steps.t: The gazebo can be found in the village centre. You should get on stage!
The gazebo can be found in the village centre. You should get on stage and sing!
The gazebo can be found in the village centre. You should get on stage and tell a story!
The gazebo can be found in the village centre. You should get on stage and show off your strength!
Fastrada Túcca can be found in Lyndelby. You should talk to Fastrada Túcca.
